layout.planSummary: Feature access depends on your plan.

toasts.invalidFormatDescription: Use PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF.
toasts.invalidSessionDescription: Sign in again to save your profile.
toasts.missingDataDescription: Complete first and last name to save your profile.
toasts.unexpectedErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
toasts.updatedDescription: Your profile data was saved successfully.
toasts.selectOppositionDescription: Choose a valid exam track before changing.
toasts.noChangesDescription: This exam track is already selected.
toasts.oppositionUpdatedDescription: From now on, Tests and Syllabus will use this exam track.
toasts.localeUpdateFailedDescription: Try again in a few seconds.
toasts.localeUpdatedDescription: Language was applied and saved to your profile.
toasts.paymentPortalRedirectDescription: Redirecting you to the secure portal to manage your subscription.
toasts.paymentPortalRedirectErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.

myProfile.description: Manage your personal and study information to tailor the full experience.

colorSection.description: This color is applied instantly to primary app elements.

oppositionSection.title: Exam track management
oppositionSection.description: If you change exam track, Tests and Syllabus sections will adjust to the new selection.

paymentSection.title: Subscription and billing
paymentSection.description: From the secure portal you can update your payment method, review invoices, or cancel your subscription.
paymentSection.noSubscriptionDescription: You do not have an active paid subscription right now. Once Premium is active, you can manage your subscription from here.

dialog.title: Confirm exam track change
dialog.description: You are about to change your active exam track to "{{opposition}}". Do you want to continue?

toasts.mockReadyDescription: You are about to start a general mock exam for {{opposition}}.
toasts.selectTopicDescription: Choose at least one topic before launching the quick test.
toasts.selectTopicsDescription: Select at least one topic or block before launching the quick test.
toasts.quickTestFailedDescription: Quick test generation failed. Please try again in a few seconds.
toasts.missingSessionDescription: Sign in again to generate the quick test.

test.title: Tests for your exam track
test.description: You will only see and practice with the active exam track in your profile.
test.planSummary: Test access depends on your plan.
test.planSummaryFree: Tests are available only with the Pro plan.
test.planSummaryPro: Your Pro plan includes access to tests.
test.quickDialogDescription: Choose blocks and topics from {{opposition}} to generate your test.
test.quickDialogQuestionsHint: You can adjust between 1 and {{planLimit}} questions with your current plan.
test.quickDialogNoTopics: There are no topics available for this exam track.
test.inProgressDialogTitle: You already have a test in progress
test.inProgressDialogDescription: You have a started quick test with {{answeredCount}} saved answers (last activity: {{lastInteraction}}). If you continue, a new test will be generated.

syllabus.title: Syllabus for your exam track
syllabus.description: Only the active exam track from your profile is shown.
syllabus.pdfOpenFailedDescription: Please try again in a few seconds.
syllabus.viewerInvalidPdf: A valid syllabus PDF could not be identified.
syllabus.viewerLoadFailedDescription: The PDF could not be loaded.
syllabus.viewerPopupBlockedTitle: Could not open a new tab
syllabus.noContent: No syllabus content is available yet for this exam track.
syllabus.noTopics: This exam track does not have uploaded topics yet.
syllabus.contentLockedDescription: With the paid plan you can access the full syllabus content.

opositAI.title: opositAI section
opositAI.description: Your assistant for solving questions, generating study plans, and preparing real-time reviews.
opositAI.directAccessDescription: Open the full experience to work with prompts, study context, and recommendations.
opositAI.planSummary: Your current plan allows {{aiLimit}} AI requests per day.

study.description: Manage your Pomodoro cycle and keep control from any screen.

testSession.title: Generated quick test
testSession.description: Answer the questions and grade at the end.
testSession.missingDataDescription: There is no data available for this test in the current session.
testSession.lockedTitle: Tests are available only in Pro
testSession.lockedDescription: Your current plan does not include access to take tests. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
testSession.readOnlyHistoryDescription: This test is already finished. You can review it, but you cannot take it again on the free plan.
testSession.emptyQuestionsDescription: The backend did not return valid questions for this attempt.
testSession.navigateHint: Tap the number to jump directly to a question.
testSession.leaveDialogTitle: Are you sure you want to leave?
testSession.leaveDialogDescription: You have a test in progress. If you leave now, you can resume it later from where you left off.
testSession.resultDialogDescription: You completed the quick test. Here is your final summary.
testSession.noCorrectionKeyLabel: This question has no correction key.
testSession.noExplanationLabel: No explanation available for this question.
